_readme: Copy this file to scripts/qa-config.json (it is gitignored) and fill in what you use. Email needs a Gmail App Password (myaccount.google.com → Security → 2-Step Verification → App passwords). SMS needs a Twilio account (twilio.com) — the text lands in the iPhone Messages app; Apple offers no public iMessage API. With neither configured, the code prints in the QA Console's terminal window.
